creator: fstoffel@gmx.de
text:
The bootup hangs after the following message with a panic and the system
will reboot after 15 seconds:

panic: OHCI_add_done addr 0x0009ec40 not found

This happens before the installer is loaded.

I've tried
- to disable Dos keyboard and mouse emulation, makes no difference
- to disable ACPI support - makes no difference
